Terms of Service

1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing and using QuickTransfer, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use our service.

2. Use of Service

QuickTransfer provides a temporary file transfer service. You are responsible for all content you upload and share. We do not monitor user content but reserve the right to remove any files that violate these terms.

3. Prohibited Content

You may not use QuickTransfer to share:

  • Illegal or infringing content
  • Malware, viruses, or malicious scripts
  • Pornographic or sexually explicit material
  • Content that promotes hate speech or violence

4. Data Retention

QuickTransfer is a temporary service. Files are automatically deleted after the specified expiration time or after being downloaded (depending on system settings). We do not guarantee permanent storage.

5. Disclaimer of Warranties

The service is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We are not responsible for any data loss during transfer or storage.

6. Changes to Terms

We may update these terms from time to time. Your continued use of the service after changes signifies your acceptance of the new terms.

Last Updated: October 2024
